title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 313.824 - Boat and game operator licensees to furnish reports to commission — commission security staff to be on boat, costs paid by boat licensee
text:
313.824.  Boat and game operator licensees to furnish reports to commission — commission security staff to be on boat, costs paid by boat licensee. — Gambling excursion boat and gambling game operator licensees shall furnish to the commission reports and information as the commission may require with respect to its activities.  The commission shall establish by rules and regulations the amount of staff necessary to protect the public on any excursion gambling boat.  The excursion gambling boat licensee shall reimburse the commission for the full cost of such staff.
(L. 1991 H.B. 149 § 11 Adopted by Referendum, Proposition A, November 3, 1992, A.L. 1993 S.B. 10 & 11 § 11) 
Effective 4-29-93
